fullName: Baton Rouge SQL Server User Group
title: BRSSUG | Baton Rouge SQL Server User Group
description: BRSSUG is a free, no-registration-required user group for SQL Server, .NET, and data platform professionals in Baton Rouge, LA. We meet monthly at Jones Creek Regional Library.
location: Jones Creek Regional Library, 6222 Jones Creek Rd, Baton Rouge, LA 70817
meetingSchedule: Second Wednesday of the month · 6:00 PM
